tooltip_close.context: Tooltip on the X button that closes a pop-up.

nav_studio.context: Top nav link that opens the pattern editor.

welcome_back.context: Greeting shown on return. {name} is the user's display name and must not be translated.

saved_ago.context: Autosave indicator. {timeAgo} is a localized relative time such as "2 minutes ago".

count_patterns.context: Count of patterns in a list header. Needs full plural forms in every locale.

instr_work_sc.text: {count, plural, one {Work # single crochet in the next stitch.} other {Work # single crochet in the next stitch.}}
instr_work_sc.context: Pattern instruction with a stitch count. ICU so the noun agrees with the number in every locale.

empty_projects.text: No projects yet. Start your first pattern and it will show up here.
empty_projects.context: Empty-state message in the projects list.
